items.desc: A key-shaped blade that chooses its wielder. Also opens stubborn doors.
items.name: Kingdom Key

items.desc: Restores a moderate amount of health. Tastes faintly of stars.
items.name: Potion

items.desc: Restores special energy.
items.name: Ether

items.desc: Fully restores health and energy. Hoarded by adventurers forever.
items.name: Elixir

items.desc: Salty, but sweet. Best eaten on top of a clock tower.
items.name: Sea-Salt Ice Cream

items.desc: A pouch of munny. Exchange rates with gold are a shopkeeper's dream.
items.name: Munny Pouch

items.desc: A clear shard dropped by Heartless.
items.name: Lucid Shard

items.desc: Warm to the touch. Do not store near the ice cream.
items.name: Blaze Shard

items.desc: A shard of concentrated cold.
items.name: Frost Shard

items.desc: Crackles quietly at night.
items.name: Thunder Shard

items.desc: Glows softly. Popular as a night light.
items.name: Bright Shard

items.desc: A rare and famous metal.
items.name: Mythril

items.desc: A page torn from a very hungry storybook.
items.name: Torn Page

items.desc: A building block for ships that sail between worlds.
items.name: Gummi Block

items.desc: Share it with someone and your destinies intertwine. No refunds.
items.name: Paopu Fruit

items.desc: Makes you feel about twice as big as you are.
items.name: Super Mushroom

items.desc: Handle with oven mitts.
items.name: Fire Flower

items.desc: Refreshingly dangerous.
items.name: Ice Flower

items.desc: Brief invincibility and an overwhelming urge to run at things.
items.name: Starman

items.desc: A second chance in fungus form.
items.name: 1-Up Mushroom

items.desc: Sturdy, aerodynamic, previously occupied.
items.name: Koopa Shell

items.desc: Speckled and warm. Please do not sell to hungry customers.
items.name: Yoshi Egg

items.desc: Grants a dramatic yellow cape and improved hang time.
items.name: Cape Feather

items.desc: Ears and a tail included. Statue mode sold separately.
items.name: Tanooki Leaf

items.desc: Shakes the entire room. Handle gently.
items.name: POW Block

items.desc: It goes 'bling' when you collect it. Endlessly satisfying.
items.name: Gold Coin

items.desc: Worth more, and it knows it.
items.name: Red Coin

items.desc: It is alive and it is ticking. Store away from the POW blocks.
items.name: Bob-omb

items.desc: Summons a very punctual tornado.
items.name: Warp Whistle

items.desc: Property of a frequently kidnapped monarch.
items.name: Royal Crown

items.desc: For carpentry, chiefly. Chiefly.
items.name: Sturdy Hammer

items.desc: Less a sword, more a wall with ambitions.
items.name: Buster Sword

items.desc: Light, sharp, dependable.
items.name: Mythril Sword

items.desc: A soft feather that argues with death and usually wins.
items.name: Phoenix Down

items.desc: The classic blue bottle.
items.name: FF Potion

items.desc: Like a potion, but taller.
items.name: Hi-Potion

items.desc: Restores magical energy and smells of static.
items.name: FF Ether

items.desc: Everyone owns one. No one has ever used one.
items.name: FF Elixir

items.desc: Crystallized knowledge of the planet. Slightly slippery.
items.name: Materia

items.desc: Warm yellow. Smells faintly of greens. Kweh.
items.name: Chocobo Feather

items.desc: Sets itself up at save points. Union rules.
items.name: Tent

items.desc: Cures everything except heartbreak and poor sales.
items.name: Remedy

items.desc: Liquid confidence.
items.name: Hero Drink

items.desc: Legendary armament of a legendary thief's wishlist.
items.name: Genji Glove

items.desc: Deceptively adorable. Blocks nearly every misfortune known.
items.name: Ribbon

items.desc: A fragment of the Crystal Ruins. Hums in four-part harmony.
items.name: Crystal Shard

items.desc: The blade of evil's bane. Sells itself, refuses to be sold.
items.name: Master Sword

items.desc: Fireproof, arrow-proof, chicken-proof.
items.name: Hylian Shield

items.desc: Extremely flammable. Sold as-is.
items.name: Wooden Shield

items.desc: Always comes back. Unlike some customers.
items.name: Boomerang

items.desc: Grappling hook, spring-loaded, satisfaction guaranteed.
items.name: Hookshot

items.desc: A bag of bombs. The bag is the safe part.
items.name: Bomb Bag

items.desc: Contains one (1) very patient fairy.
items.name: Fairy Bottle

items.desc: A crystallized extra helping of life itself.
items.name: Heart Container

items.desc: Tastes green.
items.name: Green Potion

items.desc: The expensive one.
items.name: Blue Potion

items.desc: A classic. Pairs well with pot-smashing.
items.name: Red Potion

items.desc: Blinding flash on impact. Not a snack.
items.name: Deku Nut

items.desc: Currency of Hyrule, found primarily in tall grass.
items.name: Rupee

items.desc: Opens exactly one door, somewhere.
items.name: Small Key

items.desc: A sliver of divine power. Glows smugly.
items.name: Triforce Fragment

items.desc: Sturdy lumber from the Lost Woods. Occasionally mutters.
items.name: Deku Wood

items.desc: Standard issue. Buy in bulk.
items.name: Kunai

items.desc: Pointy in every direction.
items.name: Shuriken

items.desc: Paper that goes boom. Keep away from the ramen steam.
items.name: Explosive Tag

items.desc: Tastes terrible, works great.
items.name: Soldier Pill

items.desc: Concentrated energy in candy form.
items.name: Chakra Pill

items.desc: Covered in techniques you are not supposed to read.
items.name: Ninja Scroll

items.desc: Sign in blood. Standard contract stuff.
items.name: Summoning Scroll

items.desc: Village affiliation sold separately.
items.name: Forehead Protector

items.desc: Do not make eye contact with the merchandise.
items.name: Sharingan Fragment

items.desc: Solidified spiritual energy, faintly warm.
items.name: Chakra Crystal

items.desc: Miso, extra chashu. The house specialty of a certain stand.
items.name: Ramen Bowl

items.desc: All-you-can-eat. Financially ruinous for the issuer.
items.name: Ichiraku Meal Ticket

items.desc: Heavier than they look. That is the point.
items.name: Training Weights

items.desc: For dramatic exits and awkward conversations.
items.name: Smoke Bomb

items.desc: Proof of an encounter with one of the three legends.
items.name: Legendary Sannin Token

items.desc: One of seven. Collect the set, get one wish. Collector demand is absurd.
items.name: Dragon Ball

items.desc: Full recovery in one bite. Chew thoroughly.
items.name: Senzu Bean

items.desc: Click, poof: anything from a bike to a house. Patent fiercely defended.
items.name: Capsule

items.desc: Displays power levels. Prone to shattering at dramatic moments.
items.name: Scouter

items.desc: Bright orange. Zero stealth value, infinite style.
items.name: Turtle School Gi

items.desc: Stretches with any transformation. Shoulder pads optional.
items.name: Saiyan Armor

items.desc: Take it off mid-fight for dramatic effect.
items.name: Weighted Clothing

items.desc: From the very top of the tower. Mostly placebo. Mostly.
items.name: Sacred Water

items.desc: Stores ki. Occasionally shouts.
items.name: Energy Crystal

items.desc: Gotta sell 'em all.
items.name: PokÃ© Ball

items.desc: Like a PokÃ© Ball, but great.
items.name: Great Ball

items.desc: Premium capture technology in a tasteful black and yellow.
items.name: Ultra Ball

items.desc: Never fails. Never duplicated. Never cheap.
items.name: Master Ball

items.desc: A convenient spray-type medicine.
items.name: PokÃ©mon Potion

items.desc: Fixes everything. The champion's favorite stall tactic.
items.name: Full Restore

items.desc: Instant experience. Nutritionists remain baffled.
items.name: Rare Candy

items.desc: One-way trip to the entrance. Rope not reusable, physics unclear.
items.name: Escape Rope

items.desc: The only affordable way to obtain a million-credit bicycle.
items.name: Bicycle Voucher

items.desc: An encyclopedia that judges you for incomplete entries.
items.name: PokÃ©dex

items.desc: Fell from the moon, allegedly.
items.name: Moon Stone

items.desc: Warm forever. Great for cold shelves.
items.name: Fire Stone

items.desc: Do not stack near the Magnemite display.
items.name: Thunder Stone

items.desc: Perpetually damp in a pleasant way.
items.name: Water Stone

items.desc: A warm egg that makes everything around it slightly luckier.
items.name: Lucky Egg

items.desc: Sometimes, against all odds, you hang on.
items.name: Focus Band

items.desc: Squeeze rocks into juice.
items.name: Power Wrist

items.desc: A tiny bell blessed by a great fairy.
items.name: Fairy Charm

items.desc: A star-shaped charm carved from paopu wood.
items.name: Paopu Charm

items.desc: Attach to a Keyblade to change its destiny. Or to keys.
items.name: Oathkeeper Keyblade

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge, humming with Traverse Town's lamplight.
items.name: World Shard: Traverse

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge. Smells like fresh grass and coins.
items.name: World Shard: Mushroom

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge, refracting a hundred sunsets.
items.name: World Shard: Crystal

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge. Birds nest near it instinctively.
items.name: World Shard: Hyrule

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge, wrapped in someone's old headband cloth.
items.name: World Shard: Leaf

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge. Faintly warm, like a distant sunrise.
items.name: World Shard: Lookout

items.desc: The last fragment of the World Bridge. It buzzes: pika, pika.
items.name: World Shard: Viridian

items.desc: A Fire Flower's spirit sealed in a Blaze Shard. Warm handshake included.
items.name: Flame Charm

items.desc: A Senzu Bean dissolved in Full Restore. Medically alarming, extremely effective.
items.name: Perfect Recovery

items.desc: Materia infused with chakra. Glows in two colors and argues with itself.
items.name: Energy Materia

items.desc: A fairy wearing a tiny phoenix-feather cloak. She insists it's fashion.
items.name: Revival Fairy

items.desc: A Thunder Stone core wrapped in Thunder Shard filigree. Hair-raising.
items.name: Storm Pendant

items.desc: Mushroom-glazed soldier pill skewers. The mushroom makes it a meal.
items.name: Hero's Meal

items.desc: Capsule Corp engineering meets Silph Co design. Both legal teams are furious.
items.name: Pocket Capsule

items.desc: A Keyblade humming with a Triforce fragment. Opens hearts AND treasure chests.
items.name: Courage Keyblade

items.desc: Power Pole grain fused with Deku heartwood. Extends AND mutters.
items.name: Ancient Staff

items.desc: Ramen topped with sea-salt ice cream. Reviews are split exactly 50/50.
items.name: Questionable Combo Meal

items.desc: A Starman lashed to a sturdy hammer. Technically a wand. Legally a hammer.
items.name: Star Rod Replica

items.desc: A ninja substitution log dressed as a PokÃ©mon doll. Takes one hit for you, judges you after.
items.name: Substitute Plush

items.desc: A keyblade of hearts and dice. Fortune favors whoever holds it.
items.name: Lady Luck Keyblade

items.desc: A spotted pink egg that wobbles hopefully when you hum.
items.name: Pink Yoshi Egg

items.desc: A spotted blue egg. Something inside is practicing its flutter jump.
items.name: Blue Yoshi Egg

items.desc: A spotted red egg, warm to the touch and faintly impatient.
items.name: Red Yoshi Egg

items.desc: A spotted orange egg that smells vaguely of melon.
items.name: Orange Yoshi Egg

items.desc: A spotted aqua egg cool as sea glass.
items.name: Aqua Yoshi Egg

items.desc: A giggling bean from the Beanbean fields. It knows something you don't.
items.name: Hee Bean

items.desc: A chuckling bean prized for brewing Chuckola Cola.
items.name: Chuckle Bean

items.desc: A hooting bean that whistles softly in a breeze.
items.name: Hoo Bean

items.desc: A barrel-sized mallet on a stick. Swing with both hands and an apology ready.
items.name: DK Hammer

items.desc: A whooping bean. Baristas fight over sacks of these.
items.name: Woo Bean

items.desc: A green-capped mushroom that hands out second chances.
items.name: 1UP Mushroom

items.desc: A deluxe green mushroom. Comes with a second chance and a growth spurt.
items.name: 1UP Super Mushroom

items.desc: A legendary gray handheld from another world. Still has batteries.
items.name: Gameboy

items.desc: An immaculate royal gown. Somehow never wrinkles, even mid-kidnapping.
items.name: Peach's Dress

items.desc: A purple-capped mushroom. Absolutely do not garnish anything with it.
items.name: Poison Mushroom

items.desc: A kingdom key gone sickly violet. It hums a wrong note.
items.name: Poison Kingdom Key

items.desc: A golden lamp-themed keyblade. The third wish is always freedom.
items.name: Three Wishes Keyblade

items.desc: A coral keyblade smelling faintly of the tide.
items.name: Crabclaw Keyblade

items.desc: A pitch-black keyblade heavy with memories better left closed.
items.name: Oblivion Keyblade

items.desc: A harp-strung keyblade that chimes with pixie laughter.
items.name: Fairy Harp Keyblade

items.desc: A keyblade carved from wooden toys and stardust.
items.name: Wishing Star Keyblade

items.desc: A coliseum-champion keyblade. Smells of laurels and sweat.
items.name: Olympia Keyblade

items.desc: A rose-wound keyblade. Every petal is a promise.
items.name: Divine Rose Keyblade

items.desc: A bat-winged blade with a baleful eye. It is definitely watching you.
items.name: Soul Eater

items.desc: A stronger spray-on medicine. Stings for exactly one second.
items.name: Super Potion

items.desc: Hospital-grade healing in a convenient purple spray.
items.name: Hyper Potion

items.desc: Restores a move's energy. Tastes like static.
items.name: Pokémon Ether

items.desc: A Lavaridge specialty baked over volcanic heat. Cures every ailment known.
items.name: Lava Cookie

items.desc: A peculiar stone with a leaf pattern. Certain creatures adore it.
items.name: Leaf Stone

items.desc: A small, rather popular mushroom. Collectors buy them by the crate.
items.name: Tiny Mushroom

items.desc: A rare, large mushroom. Smells like money and soil.
items.name: Big Mushroom

items.desc: Sweet as syrup. Cures poison on the way down.
items.name: Pecha Berry

items.desc: A fiery little berry that loosens stiff joints.
items.name: Cheri Berry

items.desc: A juicy blue berry. The classic trail snack of trainers.
items.name: Oran Berry

items.desc: A big citrus berry that restores strength remarkably well.
items.name: Sitrus Berry

items.desc: A shard of pink gemstone that sparkles like a night sky.
items.name: Star Piece

items.desc: An ancient red shard. Hobbyists trade whole collections for one.
items.name: Red Shard

items.desc: An ancient blue shard washed up from the seafloor.
items.name: Blue Shard

items.desc: An ancient yellow shard that glints like old amber.
items.name: Yellow Shard

items.desc: An ancient green shard. Divers swear they bring luck.
items.name: Green Shard

items.desc: A solid lump of pure gold. Why do so many people just hand these out?
items.name: Nugget

items.desc: A spoon bent by sheer willpower. Useless for soup, priceless for psychics.
items.name: Twisted Spoon

items.desc: Shady-looking shades that make dark deeds 10% darker.
items.name: Black Glasses

items.desc: A fossilized root of an ancient sea plant. Museums pay handsomely.
items.name: Root Fossil

items.desc: A deep-red orb said to stir the continent-maker from its slumber.
items.name: Red Orb

items.desc: A deep-blue orb said to call the sea-bringer. Keep it dry.
items.name: Blue Orb

items.desc: A disc holding a battle technique. Single use, endless arguments.
items.name: Technical Machine

items.desc: Somebody's unfinished meal that somehow never runs out.
items.name: Leftovers

items.desc: A charm that doubles any payday. Merchants pretend not to want one.
items.name: Amulet Coin

items.desc: A chime of pink shells that soothes wounds with every ring.
items.name: Shell Bell

items.desc: A fizzy drink best served ice-cold at a bicycle race.
items.name: Soda Pop

items.desc: A very sweet can of lemonade from a rooftop vending machine.
items.name: Lemonade

items.desc: A steaming bowl big enough to satisfy... well, not a Saiyan.
items.name: Hearty Ramen

items.desc: A roast drumstick the size of a small child. Serves one Saiyan.
items.name: Dino Drumstick

items.desc: A double-stacked burger from West City's finest drive-through.
items.name: Mega Burger

items.desc: Premium marbled beef. Ox King insists it be grilled, never boiled.
items.name: Marbled Beef

items.desc: Delivered door to door by a very fast paper boy in training.
items.name: Fresh Milk

items.desc: An ice-cold can of soda. The official drink of tournament spectators.
items.name: Chilled Soda

items.desc: Caught bare-handed by tail-fishing. Feeds a village or one hungry boy.
items.name: Giant River Fish

items.desc: A gleaming gold zeni. Capsule Corp pocket change.
items.name: Zeni Coin

items.desc: A golden idol looted from a desert vault. Pilaf wants it back.
items.name: Ancient Idol

items.desc: A folding windmill shuriken. Demon wind included at no extra cost.
items.name: Fuma Shuriken

items.desc: Scatter behind you and listen for the footsteps to stop.
items.name: Makibishi Spikes

items.desc: Guaranteed to take exactly one hit for you. The log understands.
items.name: Substitution Log

items.desc: Bandages, salves and a stern note about not overdoing it.
items.name: Field Medkit

items.desc: A plump frog purse that guards its coins jealously.
items.name: Gama-chan Wallet

items.desc: Three colorful rice dumplings on a stick. A certain jonin's favorite.
items.name: Dango Skewer

items.desc: A mission-reward pouch heavy with ryo. Don't let Naruto borrow it.
items.name: Ryo Pouch

items.desc: A green-capped mushroom for serious growth spurts.
items.name: Ultra Mushroom

items.desc: A minty four-leaf herb that clears any ailment, including embarrassment.
items.name: Refreshing Herb

items.desc: Devilishly hot. Boosts power and ruins conversation.
items.name: Red Pepper

items.desc: A crisp pepper that toughens the eater's hide.
items.name: Green Pepper

items.desc: An impossibly blue pepper. Eat it and try to stand still.
items.name: Blue Pepper

items.desc: A red shell that never misses. The green ones are jealous.
items.name: Red Koopa Shell

items.desc: Crack it over something's head. There is always a prize inside.
items.name: Smash Egg

items.desc: Split into a crowd of yourself and pile on.
items.name: Copy Flower

items.desc: A two-headed flower that pools everyone's fire into one blast.
items.name: Mix Flower
Gust Jar
items.desc: Inhales webs, dust, and unsuspecting ChuChus. Exhales them with interest.

items.name: Cane of Pacci
items.desc: Flips pots, foes, and your worldview upside down.

items.name: Mole Mitts
items.desc: Dig through anything. Manicure not included.

items.name: Lantern
items.desc: Keeps the dark exactly one lantern-width away.

items.name: Pegasus Boots
items.desc: Run so fast the scenery apologizes.

items.name: Roc's Cape
items.desc: Jump. Higher. No — higher than that.

items.name: White Sword
items.desc: Three Picori blessings and a fresh coat of courage.

items.name: Four Sword
items.desc: Splits its wielder into four. Splits the bill into one.

items.name: Remote Bomb
items.desc: Boom on your schedule. Mostly on your schedule.

items.name: Wake-Up Mushroom
items.desc: Smells the way an alarm clock sounds.

items.name: Kinstone Piece
items.desc: Half of a promise. Fuse it with a stranger's and fate does the paperwork.

items.name: Big Key
items.desc: Too big for pockets. Opens the one door that matters.

items.name: Earth Element
items.desc: The ground hums politely whenever it passes.

items.name: Fire Element
items.desc: Warm to the touch. Warmer to the argument.

items.name: Water Element
items.desc: Never spills. Judges those who do.

items.name: Wind Element
items.desc: Restless in the display case. Checks the window.

items.name: Goku Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Goku for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Vegeta Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Vegeta for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Piccolo Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Piccolo for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Cell Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Cell for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Trunks Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Trunks for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Krillin Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Krillin for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Android 18 Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Android 18 for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Android 17 Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Android 17 for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Android 19 Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Android 19 for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Tien Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Tien for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Yamcha Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Yamcha for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Master Roshi Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Master Roshi for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Hercule Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Hercule for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Kami Plushie
items.desc: A soft collectible Kami for the discerning shelf.

items.name: Dr Gero Plush
items.desc: A soft collectible Dr Gero Plush for the discerning shelf.

items.name: King Kami Sculpture
items.desc: A carved lookout guardian. Heavier than it looks; twice as serene.

items.name: Capsule Corp Entry Card
items.desc: Swipes you past the Capsule Corp lobby. Dr. Briefs never remembers your name.

items.name: Fishing Bait
items.desc: Goku catches dinner-sized fish with this. And occasionally dinner-sized trouble.

items.name: Goku's Favorite
items.desc: An entire table's worth of food, plated for one. He'll ask for seconds.

items.name: Dragon Ball Set
items.desc: All seven, gathered. Summon eternal profit — or one (1) wish.
The little red bottle every realm run leans on. Down it, live.
items.name: Health Potion

items.desc: Blue and bracing. Tops off the mana you were about to need.
items.name: Magic Potion

items.desc: The grind in a bottle. A permanent +5 to the faithful; a full heal to the desperate.
items.name: Potion of Life

items.desc: Liquid aggression. Your shots hit noticeably harder for a while.
items.name: Potion of Attack

items.desc: Drink to shrug off the bullet hell a little longer.
items.name: Potion of Defense

items.desc: Kiting fuel. The realm rewards the fleet of foot.
items.name: Potion of Speed

items.desc: Steadier hands, faster fire — loose an extra shot on the house.
items.name: Potion of Dexterity

items.desc: Knits wounds closed between waves. Modest, reliable.
items.name: Potion of Vitality

items.desc: Sharpens the mind and hurries your ability back.
items.name: Potion of Wisdom

items.desc: A humble starter bow. Fires true; asks little.
items.name: Leaf Bow

items.desc: Three reef-bright arrows at once. A realm-runner's workhorse.
items.name: Coral Bow

items.desc: One enormous piercing shot. Ghost King's gift, coveted realm-wide.
items.name: Doom Bow

items.desc: Twin bolts of the void. The Cube God's parting insult.
items.name: Staff of the Cosmic Whole

items.desc: A single piercing lance of light. Long reach, no waste.
items.name: Wand of Recompense

items.desc: Close, fast, relentless. For the shopkeeper who leads with the chin.
items.name: Sword of Splendor

items.desc: Wicked and quick. Rude to the customers, ruder to the horde.
items.name: Dagger of Foul Malevolence

items.desc: A poison-edged katana that throws a tight double arc.
items.name: Doku no Ken

items.desc: Supple scaled leather. Light on the shoulders, heavy on survival.
items.name: Hydra Skin Armor

items.desc: Columns of plate. Stands where lesser shopkeepers fall.
items.name: Acropolis Armor

items.desc: Thin cloth, enormous power. Glass-cannon chic.
items.name: Robe of the Grand Sorcerer

items.desc: The heaviest plate in the realm. Practically a walking wall.
items.name: Leviathan Armor

items.desc: Looses a shocking bolt that paralyzes. Standard-issue for archers.
items.name: Quiver of Thunder

items.desc: Slip out of sight when the bullets get personal.
items.name: Cloak of Ghostly Concealment

items.desc: Drains the fallen to mend the wielder. The necromancer's staple.
items.name: Skull of Corrupted Souls

items.desc: Raw offense on a band. Simple, effective, always in demand.
items.name: Ring of Unbound Attack

items.desc: A band of solid warding against the worst of the spread.
items.name: Ring of Unbound Defense

items.desc: For the kiter who is never quite where the bullets expect.
items.name: Ring of Unbound Speed

items.desc: Ten years of vitality poured into one band. +60 to the health bar.
items.name: Ring of Decades

items.desc: A splinter of the Realm sky, still humming with Oryx's madness.
items.name: World Shard: The Realm
